mood: Cinematic, Monumental, Trustworthy, Rugged yet Premium, Heavyweight

rules: Headings must be tracking-tight (tracking-tighter) to feel heavy and grounded.
Overlines must be tracking-[0.2em] and uppercase.
No Inter or generic fonts for headings.
Max hero heading size text-5xl to text-6xl (clamp via tailwind fluid if possible, or responsive classes like text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl).
Hierarchy Gap Rule: Ensure contrast between headings and body text is bold.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous padding: py-20, py-24, or py-32 for vertical sections.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Use bento grid styles (Mode A: The Tetris Grid) for the fleet and services. Avoid standard equal columns. Use col-span-2 or col-span-3 for emphasis to create visual tension.
layout_and_spacing.surface_styles: Flat, solid colors. 1px borders. Sharp edges or very subtle rounded-sm. NO heavy glassmorphism for content cards (it feels too 'tech SaaS'), use solid blocks for industrial feel. Glassmorphism allowed ONLY on sticky header.

pages_and_sections.name: Navigation (Sticky)
pages_and_sections.content: Logo (DRC Plant Hire), Links (About, Fleet, Sand, Pricing, Contact), CTA (Get Quote).
pages_and_sections.design: Backdrop blur (Crystal Glass) over dark background. border-b border-[#193E2A]. z-50 fixed at top.

pages_and_sections.name: Hero
pages_and_sections.content: Tagline: 'Together, we build the future.', Title: 'Heavy Machinery & Sand Supply for the Modern Builder', CTA: 'Get a Quote', secondary CTA: 'View Fleet'.
pages_and_sections.design: Full-screen or 90vh cinematic image with gradient overlay from bottom to top (bg-gradient-to-t from-[#06130C] via-[#06130C]/80 to-transparent). Content anchored to bottom-left.

pages_and_sections.name: About
pages_and_sections.content: 'Reliable Machines. Trusted Service. Together we build the future.'
pages_and_sections.design: Large typography section. Text-4xl Clash Display. High contrast, using text_main and primary color for emphasis words.

pages_and_sections.name: Fleet & Services
pages_and_sections.content: Showcase of TLB, Excavator, Tipper Truck, Bobcat/Skid Steer. Also Sand products (Riversand, Building Sand, Filling Sand).
pages_and_sections.design: Bento Grid (Mode A). Heavy cards with machinery images. Sand image gets a prominent 2-column span block. Hovering over cards slightly scales image and brightens border.

pages_and_sections.name: Why Choose Us
pages_and_sections.content: 3 trust pillars: Reliable Machines/Strong Performance, Trusted Service/Local Commitment, Together We Build The Future.
pages_and_sections.design: Grid with 3 columns. Use Lucide icons. Large numbers (01, 02, 03) in background.

pages_and_sections.name: Pricing
pages_and_sections.content: Pricing table per delivery area: Hlaneki-A R1100, Babangu/Gonono R1200, Mavhuza/Ndhengeza R1200, Maxavele/Nwa-Makena/Navelani/Dzingidzingi/Bode R1200, Mapuve Nkuri R1200.
pages_and_sections.design: Technical, tabular layout. Clean lines (Grid Borders style). Row hover effects. Emphasize price.

pages_and_sections.name: Contact & Quote
pages_and_sections.content: Request Quote form (name, phone, email, service, location, message). Contact info: Tel 069 157 6873, Cell 084 986 3991, Email mbewuh@yahoo.com, Address: Stand no 1 R578 road, Hlaneki Giyani 0826. Map.
pages_and_sections.design: Split layout: Left side contact details + embedded map, Right side heavy form using Shadcn components customized to brand colors.

instructions_to_main_agent.file_extensions: CRITICAL: Build the application using .js or .jsx files, NOT .tsx files.
instructions_to_main_agent.components: Use custom HTML/Tailwind for marketing-heavy sections (Hero, Bento Grid) to allow extreme layouts. Use Shadcn components for complex logic (Contact Form, Select, Dropdown).
instructions_to_main_agent.animations: Use framer-motion for staggering lists and scroll reveals. No bouncy springs; use ease-out for heavy industrial feel.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.
instructions_to_main_agent.ui_libraries: Install and use lucide-react for icons. Install framer-motion for animations.
instructions_to_main_agent.styling: Do not wrap this JSON file in markdown. Strict dark theme application required across all elements.
